onset.Description: Event onset in seconds relative to recording start

sample.Description: Sample index of the event onset

type.Description: Type of event marker as recorded by BrainVision (Stimulus, Response, Comment, etc.)

marker_code.Description: Raw marker code from the BrainVision recorder (e.g. 'S 1' for stimulus 1, 'R128' for response 128). Renamed from BIDS 'value' to preserve non-numeric string codes.
